fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language code for the text communications.

fields.name: File Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the file name of the attachment.

fields.name: Inline Fee Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description line that will appear in the attachment along side the fee.

fields.name: Beginning Lines
fields.tooltip: Shows if there are beginning lines for the current language.

fields.name: Ending Lines
fields.tooltip: Shows if there are ending lines for the current language.
